message: Hi, I got a quote from your team last week for ₹45,000 and it seems way too high compared to competitors. I need to speak to a manager.
summary: Customer unhappy with pricing quote, requesting manager escalation.
suggestedResponse: Thank you for reaching out, Sarah. I understand your concern about the pricing. Let me connect you with our pricing specialist who can walk you through the quote breakdown.

message: I'd like to book a consultation for next Tuesday if possible. Can you confirm availability?
summary: Customer requesting to book a consultation slot for next Tuesday.
suggestedResponse: Hello Raj! We have slots available on Tuesday at 10:00 AM, 2:00 PM, and 4:30 PM. Please let us know your preferred time and we'll confirm your booking.

message: Called to ask about the monthly pricing plans and whether there's a discount for annual subscriptions.
summary: Customer enquiring about pricing plans and annual subscription discounts.
suggestedResponse: Hi Priya! Our monthly plan starts at ₹2,999/month. We offer a 20% discount on annual subscriptions, bringing it to ₹28,788/year. Would you like more details?

message: I've been waiting for my order for 3 days now and nobody is responding to my calls. This is completely unacceptable.
summary: Frustrated customer complaining about delayed order and unresponsive support.
suggestedResponse: We sincerely apologise for the inconvenience, Arjun. This is not the experience we want for you. Let me immediately escalate this to our operations team.

message: Do you offer services after 8 PM? I work late and prefer to discuss requirements in the evening.
summary: Customer asking about after-hours service availability.
suggestedResponse: Hello Neha! Our AI assistant is available 24/7 to answer your questions. For in-person consultations, we do offer evening slots until 9 PM on weekdays. Would you like to book one?

message: I want to schedule a follow-up call with the sales team about the enterprise plan we discussed last week.
summary: Returning customer requesting follow-up on enterprise plan discussion.
suggestedResponse: Hello Vikram! Great to hear from you again. I'll schedule a follow-up call with our enterprise sales team. Are you available tomorrow between 11 AM and 1 PM?

message: Just checking if my support ticket #TKT-2291 has been resolved yet?
summary: Customer following up on existing support ticket status.
suggestedResponse: Hi Ananya! Your ticket #TKT-2291 has been resolved as of this morning. You should receive a confirmation email shortly. Is there anything else I can help you with?

message: We're a startup team of 12 and looking for a communication solution. Can you tell me about team pricing?
summary: Startup enquiring about team pricing for a 12-person organisation.
suggestedResponse: Hi Dev! For a team of 12, our Team Plan at ₹1,499/user/month would be ideal, with volume discounts available. Would you like a personalised quote and demo?
